app.name: Follower Quality Scorer
app.description: AI workflow to analyze and score follower profiles for outreach prioritization.

data.title: Calculate Ratios
Analyze Bio
data.system_prompt:
Analyze this social media bio for a {{target_niche}} follower targeting campaign.

Bio: {{bio}}

Return a JSON with:
- relevance_score (0-100): How relevant is this person to {{target_niche}}
- keywords_found (array): Relevant keywords found in bio
- red_flags (array): Any spam/bot indicators
- persona_type: 'investor', 'trader', 'enthusiast', 'professional', 'unknown'

Only output valid JSON, no explanation.

data.title: Calculate Final Score
